name: Steamed Pork with Preserved Tianjin Vegetable
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------MARINADE----------------------------------
1 1/2 tsp Dark soy sauce
1/2 tsp Sesame oil
1/2 tsp Sugar
1/2 tsp Cornstarch
1/2 tsp Salt
Preparation: Mix marinade. In a bowl, mix chopped pork, water chestnuts, half of the preserved vegetable, and marinade; stir together with your fingers - it's faster. Spread mixture on a round 12-inch plate. Sprinkle with remaining preserved vegetable. Refrigerate if working in advance.
Steaming: Bring pork mixture to room temperature before steaming. Bring water in steamer to rapid boil. Steam for about 20 minutes. Sprinkle with chopped onions just before serving.
